1.description: (Color online) Workflow of Real-Time Decision Generation Applications, Different Frameworks, and Our Overall Approach Notes. (Top) In low latency applications that require high-quality contextual solutions, an automated tool produces decisions that decision makers may accept or reject. These data can be collected for training. (Left) In predict-then-optimize methods, the tool is an optimization model, which may approximate the problem to solve quickly. (Right) In machine learning methods, the tool is a predictive model trained to estimate optimal decisions. (Bottom) Our tool is a generative model, trained iteratively using a binary classifier and feasibility oracle.
